data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed commit 04d2eb4e in /private/tmp/foolery-a71f. buildLeaderboard now excludes agents unless that agent has at least 10 completed attempts and a success rate strictly greater than 25%, and computes margin and totalN from the qualified set only so filtered agents cannot affect displayed leaderboard output. Steps with no qualified agents are omitted. Regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts covers <10 attempts excluded, <=25% success excluded, qualified-only margin/totalN, qualified tie-break ordering, and all-filtered omission. Validation rerun in the worktree: bun run vitest src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts, bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
